description_long: This object is a residential complex consisting of six modern houses symmetrically arranged around a central landscaped courtyard. Each house features a white facade, dark gable roofs, and large windows, with private fenced yards and driveways. The central area includes a garden with pathways, a circular fountain, and a rectangular swimming pool with a deck. The houses are connected to the central courtyard by paved walkways, and the landscaping includes trees, shrubs, and green lawns. The overall layout is highly organized, with each house facing the communal space, promoting a sense of community. The design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern residential complex of six white houses with dark gable roofs, arranged around a landscaped courtyard with a pool and fountain. The layout is symmetrical, with private yards and communal green spaces.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the complex from the main entrance, highlighting the central pathway, fountain, and pool, with all six houses visible in a symmetrical arrangement.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the rear of the central house and a clear view of the courtyard's landscaping, with the pool and other houses in the background.
description_view_2: View 2 focuses on the pool area in the foreground, with the central courtyard and houses extending outward, emphasizing the communal amenities.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the backyards and private spaces of the houses, with the central garden and fountain visible, offering a perspective on the residential privacy.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front doors with small steps, minimal overhangs, and clean, modern lines; some houses feature small porches or entry platforms.
